title: Pick Up Sticks Game
features: Pick-up sticks or pick-a-stick is a game of physical and mental skill
In which a bundle of "sticks" are dropped as a loose bunch onto a table top, jumbling into a random pile.
Each player in turn tries to remove a stick from the pile without disturbing any of the others.
description: Product Description Supretro Pick Up Sticks Game Pick-up sticks or pick-a-stick is a game of physical and mental skill in which a bundle of "sticks" are dropped as a loose bunch onto a table top, jumbling into a random pile. Each player in turn tries to remove a stick from the pile without disturbing any of the others. Safety Warning For external use only. Avoid contact with eyes.
